experience.title: AI Study Portal — MCA (Intel AI Project)
experience.description: AI Study Portal is a production-ready, cloud-hosted academic platform with role-based access for Students, Teachers, and Admins, featuring materials, classrooms, notifications, and analytics workflows.
experience.details:
• Built a production-ready, cloud-hosted academic platform using FastAPI and React.js.
• Implemented role-based access control for Students, Teachers, and Admins.
• Developed features for materials management, classrooms, notifications, and analytics workflows.
• Integrated AI-powered chatbot and RAG-based document retrieval for intelligent study assistance.
• Deployed on cloud infrastructure with scalable architecture and real-time data sync.

experience.title: Certification Intern — Corizo
experience.description: Built a Flutter & Dart-based voting app with secure auth and real-time results using Firebase, and developed an e-commerce platform with authentication, cart, order processing, and admin dashboard.
experience.details:
• Built a Flutter & Dart-based Online Voting System with secure authentication and real-time results using Firebase.
• Developed an E-commerce Website with user authentication, cart management, order processing, and admin dashboard.
• Integrated Firebase for real-time data sync, secure auth, and backend services.
• Collaborated with mentors to optimize application performance and user experience.

experience.title: AI Desktop Assistant — BCA (Final Year Project)
experience.description: Developed a Python-based AI Assistant with AI Image Generation, Google Gemini integration, voice control, and gaming features, focusing on usability and performance optimization.
experience.details:
• Developed a Python-based AI Desktop Assistant integrating OpenAI and Google Gemini APIs.
• Implemented AI Image Generation using DALL-E for dynamic visual content creation.
• Built voice control functionality with speech recognition and text-to-speech.
• Added gaming features and interactive UI using CustomTkinter.
• Focused on usability and performance optimization for low-latency responses.
